text.title: GraphRAG — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `graph-rag`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: schema-design
step.action: Define entity_types + relation_types in Pydantic; commit schema.

step.name: extract
step.action: Per-doc extraction with stable prompt; persist entities + relations to graph store.

step.name: graph-build
step.action: Apply constraints; merge duplicates by canonical-name; index for traversal.

step.name: wire-query-router
step.action: Train / prompt query classifier; route local → vector subgraph, global → summary, hybrid → both.
